svg.title: Secure OpenSearch on AKS architecture
svg.desc: Secure private-control-plane OpenSearch deployment on Azure Kubernetes Service. Uses Microsoft Azure Architecture Icons V23 for AKS, virtual network, container instances, managed identity, storage, load balancer, private link, Defender for Cloud, and disk encryption set service icons.
svg.metadata: Azure service icons are from Microsoft Azure Architecture Icons V23, downloaded from https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/architecture/icons/ and used for an architectural diagram under Microsoft's published icon terms.
svg.text: Private AKS API, VNet-integrated portal deployment script, internal Dashboards, keyless Blob snapshots, and disk-encrypted StatefulSets.

g.text: Created by the secure portal template and OpenSearch workload assets
Delegated to Azure Container Instances so portal-run scripts can reach the private AKS API.
Private AKS cluster with dedicated node pools for stateful OpenSearch roles.
Azure service icons: Microsoft Azure Architecture Icons V23
